reviews.comment:
Mala predisposición de los empleados para poder acceder al baño, cerrado con llave,de aquí para allá me tenían,desidia total, lamentable sede central del ACA, deberían aprender de otras estaciones de servicio sobre buen trato e higiene.....

(Translated by Google)
The employees were very uncooperative and made it difficult to access the restroom, which was locked. They kept sending me back and forth. Complete negligence. The ACA headquarters is deplorable; they should learn from other service stations about good customer service and hygiene.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXaWNXZUVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Es el ACA que mas se puede decir , buena atencion precios bajos con descuentos del 5% a socios podes medir las cubiertas y hay un local de comidas

(Translated by Google)
It's the ACA that needs no further explanation: good service, low prices with a 5% discount for members, you can measure the tires there, and there's a food court.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, les falta ofrecer el servicio de presión de neumáticos atendido por playero. Sería el sumum de la excelencia!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Very good service. They should offer a tire pressure service attended by a tire attendant. That would be the pinnacle of excellence!
